raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Atalija to Pils
Karra-Wihru (un) to Lauschu
Kleegfchanu dſirdeja/ nahze ta
pee term Laudim eekſch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un ſkattijahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Raugi/ tad ſtahweja tas
Kehniſch ta KUNGA Namma
pee ta Pihlara/ ta ka Eeraddums
biſa/ un tee Trummeteri/ un
Dseedatajt biſa apkahrt to Keh-
nixu/ un wiſſi Laudis tahs Sem-
mes preezajahs / un puhte ar
Trummetehm. Tad faplohfija A-
tatija ſawas Dreheſ/ un ſanze:
Dumpis/ Dumpis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Preesteris Joja-
dus pawehleja teem Kaptei-
nehm/ kas pahr to Karra-Speh-
fu biſa eezelti/ un fazzija us teem:
Iſweddeet winnu no Namma
abra us Pagalinu/ un kas win-
nai pakkatſtaiga/ tas lai zaur
Sohbinu nomirſt/ jo tas Preeste-
rts fazzija / lai winna ta KUN-
GA Namma ne tohp nokauta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee peeleke Rohkas
pee tahs/ un ta eegahje us to Zet-
tu/ fur tee Sirgi us ta Kehnixa
Nammu eet/ un tappe tur nok-
kauta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jojadus darrija wee-
nu Derribu ſtarp to KUNGU/
nn ſtarp to Kehnixu/ un ſtarp
teeu Laudim/ ka tee ta KUN-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze wiſſi Laudis
tahs Semmes Bāāla Namina/
un nolaufija to ar winna Alta-
reem/ un fadaufija winna Bildes
itt labbi/ un nokawe Matanu
Bāāla Swehtitaju preekſch teem
Altareem/ un tas Preesteris is-
taisija attat tohs Ammatus pee
ta KUNGA Namina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch nehme tohs
Kapteines/ un Wirfneekus / un
Pils Karra-Wihrus/ un wiſſus
tahs Semmes Laudis / un tee
nowedde to Kehnixu no ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un gabje us to
Zettu no to Pils Karra-Wihru
Wahrtim us ta Kehnika Nam-
mu/ un wiſſch apfehdahs us to
Kehnixu Gohda-Krehſlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi tahs Semmes
Laudis preezajahs/ un tas Pils-
fahts norimme/ pehz to/ kad tee
Ataliju ar Sohbinu bij nokau-
wuſchi pee ta Kehnixa Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joas biſa ſeptimus
Gaddus wezz/ kad tas par Keh-
nixu tappe.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
